hero.title: Discover the Best
hero.subtitle: Explore curated riding routes from riders around the world. Find scenic roads, mountain passes, and coastal rides that make every journey unforgettable.

clarification.title: We're Not a GPS
clarification.subtitle: We curate beautiful routes for memorable trips
clarification.description: MotoTrip is a community-driven platform that shares the world's best motorcycle routes. We don't provide real-time navigation—instead, we help you discover scenic, well-organized routes that make your journey beautiful, safe, and unforgettable.

featured.title: Featured Routes
featured.subtitle: Handpicked routes that offer exceptional riding experiences

popular.title: Popular This Month
popular.subtitle: Most loved routes by the community

cta.title: Ready to Hit the Road?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of riders discovering new adventures. Share your favorite routes and inspire others.

explore.title: Explore Routes
explore.subtitle: Discover your next adventure from {count} curated motorcycle routes
explore.noResults: No routes found matching your criteria.

footer.tagline: Discover and share the best motorcycle riding routes around the world.

notFound.subtitle: Page Not Found
notFound.description: Looks like this road doesn't exist. Let's get you back on track.

submit.title: Submit a Route
submit.subtitle: Share your favorite riding route with the community
submit.formDescription: This feature will include an interactive map where you can draw your route, add stops, upload photos, and provide route details.
submit.toBeImplemented: To be implemented with map integration

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Connect with riders around the world
community.topContributorsDesc: See who's sharing the best routes

blog.comingSoonDesc: We're working on bringing you amazing stories from riders around the world. Check back soon!
